## Source: amazon-inspector (4dc307937a69a928785741aaf42f1e0e6ddea72dd3d7f7919c4ca4864d9835b4)
The package remitly-blog was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6625e90c2ca25fa19cd470cc5f013dcf4c54e2bb647f5cb9538d50bd40951a41)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'remitly-blog' @ 99999.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
